Babylon (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $16,596,054Details
International Box Office $47,730,561
Worldwide Box Office $64,326,615
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $719,709
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,493,866
Total $2,213,575
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A tale of outsized ambition and outrageous excess, BABYLON traces the rise and fall of multiple characters during an era of unbridled decadence and depravity in early Hollywood.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$3,603,368 (21.7% of total gross)
Legs:4.61 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:25.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$80,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,343 opening theaters/3,351 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $17,504,752

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 23rd, 2022 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: January 13th, 2023 (Wide) (Finland)
January 18th, 2023 (Wide) (Slovakia)
January 18th, 2023 (Wide) (Belgium)
January 18th, 2023 (Wide) (France)
January 19th, 2023 (Wide) (New Zealand)
Video Release: January 31st, 2023 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for strong and crude sexual content, graphic nudity, bloody violence, drug use, and pervasive language.
(Rating bulletin 2761 (cert #53776), 12/7/2022)
Running Time: 188 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble
Filming location (city or town): Los Angeles, CA
Geographical setting: Hollywood
Subgenre: Historical Drama
Time period setting: 1920s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, C2 Motion Picture Group, Wild Chickens, Organism Pictures, Marc Platt Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
